headline: Hidden Fed upside catalyst for tech stocks
detail: A contrarian read suggests Wall Street is mispricing Fed policy, with a dovish surprise potentially acting as a sharp tailwind for growth and tech. This directly supports your heaviest exposure in semis, chip ETFs, and software names. If this thesis plays out, it could help AVGO and PLTR recover — but don't count on a catalyst to bail out a losing leveraged position.

headline: Cybersecurity stocks soaring, Big Tech rebounding
detail: Cybersecurity names are leading the tape higher today, which is a direct positive for your CRWD position. Big Tech attempting a rebound also supports your QQQ and SMH exposure. This is the one bright spot in your book today — CRWD is already holding well with a comfortable cushion above its stop.

headline: Supreme Court blocks Trump from firing Fed Governor Cook
detail: Fed independence staying intact reduces near-term policy uncertainty, which calms rate-sensitive growth stocks. For your tech-heavy, margin-leveraged book, Fed chaos is a real risk — this ruling removes one tail risk. Stability at the Fed is quietly bullish for your names.
